creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
- update
- use SF macro, don't limit only to `mesh'
- silence portlint(1) - pull BUILD_DEPENDS a bit up; respect PATH when
  searching for nasm(1), configure script doesn't search only under
  LOCALBASE, anyway
- dispose of pre-configure target in favor of USE_AUTOTOOLS
- sort plist
- remove no longer needed ARCH hack
